title: A Helping Hand
lesson: Helping a friend who needs you makes you both happy.
prompts: Place the person from the input image into a sunny playground in a green park on a cheerful morning, skipping happily near a sandbox and a set of swings. Medium shot at eye level, the person facing the camera with their face fully visible and a happy smile. Warm natural sunlight, soft, bright storybook illustration style. Preserve the facial features, skin tone and hairstyle of the person from the input image.

A storybook scene on the same sunny playground. The person from the input image stands on the far left, turned slightly toward the camera with their face clearly visible and a surprised, caring expression. On the right, {GENDER_M_AGE_06_RACE_WHITE} has gently tripped and is sitting on the grass beside a tipped-over basket, with toy blocks spilled across the ground, looking sad. Eye-level medium-wide shot, warm light, soft, bright storybook illustration style. Preserve the facial features, skin tone and hairstyle of the person from the input image.

Transform the scene: the person from the input image hurries across the sunny playground on the far left, facing the camera with their face fully visible and a kind, determined expression, reaching out toward a friend. On the right, {GENDER_M_AGE_06_RACE_WHITE} sits on the grass beside the spilled basket of toy blocks, looking up hopefully. Eye-level medium-wide shot, warm sunlight, soft, bright storybook illustration style. Preserve the facial features, skin tone and hairstyle of the person from the input image.

The person from the input image is on the far left, kneeling to gather the scattered toy blocks back into the basket but with the head turned toward the camera so the face stays clearly visible, smiling warmly. {GENDER_M_AGE_06_RACE_WHITE} sits to the right, watching gratefully. Same sunny playground, warm light, soft, bright storybook illustration style. Preserve the facial features, skin tone and hairstyle of the person from the input image.

A storybook scene on the same sunny playground. The person from the input image stands on the far left, facing the camera with their face fully visible and a gentle smile, holding out a helping hand. On the right, {GENDER_M_AGE_06_RACE_WHITE} stands back up holding the refilled basket of toy blocks, smiling brightly and gratefully. Eye-level medium-wide shot, warm sunlight, soft, bright storybook illustration style. Preserve the facial features, skin tone and hairstyle of the person from the input image.

The person from the input image stands on the far left, facing the camera with their face fully visible and a joyful smile, playing happily with toy blocks beside a friend. On the right, {GENDER_M_AGE_06_RACE_WHITE} laughs and plays alongside them in the sunny playground, both happy together. Eye-level medium-wide shot, golden afternoon sunlight, heart-warming, soft, bright storybook illustration style. Preserve the facial features, skin tone and hairstyle of the person from the input image.
